title: SMN2 splicing modulation rescues motor neuron defects in spinal muscular atrophy models
abstract: Small molecules that promote SMN2 exon 7 inclusion increase full-length SMN protein and improve survival in SMA model systems.

title: CRISPR activation of SMN2 as a potential therapeutic strategy for SMA
abstract: CRISPRa-mediated upregulation of SMN2 expression supports motor neuron function in preclinical experiments.
